name: vorta-mvp

scripts.test:contracts: node scripts/auth-route-contracts.mjs && node scripts/work-order-overlay-contracts.mjs && node scripts/maintenance-dashboard-contracts.mjs && node scripts/maintenance-portal-workflow-contracts.mjs && node scripts/skills-matrix-contracts.mjs && node scripts/equipment-people-workflow-contracts.mjs && node scripts/maintenance-p1-p2-contracts.mjs && node scripts/data-trust-contracts.mjs && node scripts/post-audit-p0-contracts.mjs && node scripts/audit-remediation-contracts.mjs && node scripts/rpc-security-manifest-contracts.mjs && node scripts/demo-backend-health-contracts.mjs && node scripts/live-backend-health-gate-contracts.mjs
